race.name: Great Glen Nordic Race Series
race.tagline: Nordic racing at the base of Mount Washington — New England's most iconic peak looms over a community race series with three decades of history.

climate.description: New Hampshire winter at the base of Mount Washington. Highly variable conditions with temperatures from -25°C to 0°C. Notorious for sudden weather changes.
challenges: Extreme wind chill from Mount Washington

course.primary: Trails at the base of Mount Washington through the White Mountain National Forest. Part of a six-area Nordic network. Rolling terrain with views of the Presidential Range.
features: Signature Ski & Shoe to the Clouds event on Auto Road

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Small local race series with exceptional scenery at the base of Mount Washington, but limited field size and international appeal.

history.summary: Great Glen Trails has hosted Nordic racing since the mid-1990s at the base of Mount Washington. The series includes multiple events through winter including the signature 'Ski & Shoe to the Clouds' on the Mount Washington Auto Road.
notable_facts: Racing at the base of Mount Washington since ~1994
Part of the White Mountain Nordic six-area network
Signature event climbs 2,200 ft on the Auto Road
Mix of timed races and fun community events

youtube_data.search_query: Great Glen Nordic Race Series cross country ski race Gorham

videos.title: Great Glen Nordic Ski Center - Gorham, NH
videos.description: Enjoy nordic skiing with the whole family at scenic Great Glen!

videos.title: Great Glen Nordic 300 - 2008
videos.description: The Great Glen Nordic 300 is a 5-hour cross country ski race held annually at Great Glen Trails in Pinkham Notch, NH.
videos.curation_reason: Shows the Great Glen Nordic 300 endurance race with race footage and course coverage.

videos.title: First Day of Winter 08/09 at Great Glen Trails
videos.description: Cross country skiing in heavy snow on 12/21/08 at Great Glen Trails in Pinkham Notch, NH.

videos.description: 1984 X-Country Skier Olympian Sue Wemyss  for Great Glen Trails in Pinkham Notch, NH talks about 2018 Olympic Gold Medalist Kikkan Randall's weekend at Great Glen.

videos.curation_reason: Features Olympic gold medalist visit to Great Glen with insights about the venue and Nordic skiing culture.

videos.title: Racing 24 Hours of Great Glenn, 2023
videos.description: 24 hours of Great Glenn is just outside of Gorham, NH at the base of Mount Washington. This was my second year racing here, I really like the course and the backdrop of Mount Washington is spectacular. It's a good mix of rooty, rocky single track, nordic trail and dirt road. I raced the 12 hour category and won with 115 miles and 15,000 feet of climbing.

videos.description:
Cross-country ski and snowshoe’ing come together for this decades-old event

videos.title: Nordic Meister Race Series 2018 Video Re-cap!
videos.description: The largest (and most fun) weekly cross-country race series in the country!

quotes.text: Cross-country skiers are so down to earth, they're accessible. Usually they come from small towns, they have roots with the common people. They don't grow up in these huge gymnasiums, they grow up skiing in ten degree days getting their training in.
